name: avmatrix
description: AVmatrix graph-powered code intelligence for AI agents. Index any codebase, query via MCP or CLI.
author: Abhigyan Patwari

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('No AVmatrix TypeScript test files remain; use go test ./cmd/... ./internal/... and avmatrix-web tests.')"
scripts.postinstall: go run ../cmd/avmatrix package build-runtime || go run ./go-src/cmd/avmatrix package build-runtime || cmd /c .\bin\avmatrix.exe package ensure-runtime || ./bin/avmatrix.exe package ensure-runtime
scripts.prepack: npm run build && go run ../cmd/avmatrix package prepare-go-source
scripts.postpack: go run ../cmd/avmatrix package clean-go-source || cmd /c .\bin\avmatrix.exe package clean-go-source || ./bin/avmatrix.exe package clean-go-source
